+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > Type of grid, set to 0 for a mixture of Irregular Corner-Point and Unstructured Grids, 1 for Irregular Corner-Point Grids, and 2 for Unstructured Grids.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > 1                   |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  | > Only the default value of one is supported by OPM Flow.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-2                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > The number of grid blocks in the x-direction (NX).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-3                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > The number of grid blocks in the y-direction (NY).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-4                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > The number of grid blocks in the z-direction (NZ).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-5                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > The grid reference number set to zero for the global grid or a value greater than zero to represent a [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650). For example if there are five [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)'s, then this complete data set is repeated six times, once for the global grid, and five times for the five LGRs., with the first [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) having a reference number of 1 and the last [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) having a reference number of 5.  |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-6                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > Not used.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | > 0                   |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| > to                                                                                                                                                                                   |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| > 2-24                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-25                                                                                                                                                                                 | > Data                                           | > [NUMRES](#__RefHeading___Toc81021_4106839650) the number of reservoirs, that is the number of [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256) data sets to be processed by OPM Flow. This should be set to one as the only value supported by OPM Flow                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | > 1                   |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-26                                                                                                                                                                                 | > Data                                           | > NSEG the number of coordinate line segments, should be set to 1.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | > 1                   |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-27                                                                                                                                                                                 | > Data                                           | > Cartesian/Radial grid indicator set to 0 for Cartesian grids and greater than zero for radial grids. Currently OPM Flow does not support radial geometries so this value should always be set to zero.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | > 0                   |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-28                                                                                                                                                                                 | > Data                                           | > The [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) location of the lower I-index [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the global grid. This value should be set to zero if there is no [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > 0                   |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-29                                                                                                                                                                                 | > Data                                           | > The [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) location of the lower J-index [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the global grid. This value should be set to zero if there is no [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > 0                   |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-30                                                                                                                                                                                 | > Data                                           | > The [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) location of the lower K-index [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the global grid. This value should be set to zero if there is no [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > 0                   |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-31                                                                                                                                                                                 | > Data                                           | > The [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) location of the upperI -index [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the global grid. This value should be set to zero if there is no [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > 0                   |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-32                                                                                                                                                                                 | > Data                                           | > The [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) location of the upper J-index [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the global grid. This value should be set to zero if there is no [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > 0                   |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-33                                                                                                                                                                                 | > Data                                           | > The [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) location of the uper K-index [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the global grid. This value should be set to zero if there is no [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | > 0                   |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-34                                                                                                                                                                                 | > Data                                           | > Not used by OPM Flow.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > 0                   |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| > to                                                                                                                                                                                   |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| > 2-100                                                                                                                                                                                |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                        | > BOXORIG                                        | > Not supported.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Optional            |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Format                                         | > BOXORIG                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > 3                   | > INTE |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > Ignored by OPM Flow.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| > to                                                                                                                                                                                   |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| > 2-3                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                        | > [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256)    | > Property keyword that defines the start of the [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256) data set. The [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256) data defines a set of coordinate lines or pillars for a reservoir grid via an array. The number of data values for this keyword should be 6 x (NX+1) x (NY+1) x [NUMRES](#__RefHeading___Toc81021_4106839650). Where [NUMRES](#__RefHeading___Toc81021_4106839650) represents the number of separate coordinate lines (or reservoirs).                                     | > Required            |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  | > In OPM Flow [NUMRES](#__RefHeading___Toc81021_4106839650) can only be set to one.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Format                                         | > [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | > 6 x (NX+1) x (NY+1) | > REAL |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256) data in the same format as the [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256) keyword described in the [GRID](#__RefHeading___Toc38674_784232322) section of the manual.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                        | > [COORDSYS](#__RefHeading___Toc45759_719036256) | > Coordinate definitions for each [NUMRES](#__RefHeading___Toc81021_4106839650) reservoir. The number of data values for this keyword should be 6 x [NUMRES](#__RefHeading___Toc81021_4106839650). Where [NUMRES](#__RefHeading___Toc81021_4106839650) represents the number of separate coordinate lines (or reservoirs).                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > Optional            |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  | > In OPM Flow [NUMRES](#__RefHeading___Toc81021_4106839650) can only be set to one.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Format                                         | > [COORDSYS](#__RefHeading___Toc45759_719036256)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | > 6                   | > INTE |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > Ignored by OPM Flow.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| > to                                                                                                                                                                                   |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| > 2-6                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                        | > [ZCORN](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_7190362561)   | > Property keyword that defines the start of the [ZCORN](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_7190362561) data set. [ZCORN](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_7190362561) defines the depth of each corner point of a grid block on the pillars defining the reservoir grid. The number of data values for this keyword should be 8 x NX x NY x NZ.                                                                                                                                                                                                    | > Required            |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-2                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Format                                         | > [ZCORN](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_7190362561)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | > 8 x NX x NY x NZ    | > REAL |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-3                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Type                                           | > Type of data in the Data fields.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > [ZCORN](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_7190362561) data in the same format as the [ZCORN](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_7190362561) keyword described in the [GRID](#__RefHeading___Toc38674_784232322) section of the manual.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                        | > [ACTNUM](#__RefHeading___Toc4410_421927891)    | > Property keyword that defines the start of the [ACTNUM](#__RefHeading___Toc4410_421927891) data set. [ACTNUM](#__RefHeading___Toc4410_421927891) specifies which grid blocks are active or inactive. A value of 1 indicates the block is active and a value of 0 indicates the block is inactive.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | > Optional            |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  | > Although this data set status is set to Optional, it is normally always written out by pre-processing software.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  | > The number of data values for this keyword should be NX x NY x NZ integer values.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Format                                         | > [ACTNUM](#__RefHeading___Toc4410_421927891)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | > NX x NY x NZ        | > INTE |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > [ACTNUM](#__RefHeading___Toc4410_421927891) data in the same format as the [ACTNUM](#__RefHeading___Toc4410_421927891) keyword described in the [GRID](#__RefHeading___Toc38674_784232322) section of the manual.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                        | > CORSNUM                                        | > Property keyword that defines the start of the CORSNUM data set for when the grid has been coarsened.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > Optional            |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  | > The number of data values for this keyword should be NX x NY x NZ integer values.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  | > Grid coarsening is currently not supported in OPM Flow.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Format                                         | > CORSNUM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > NX x NY x NZ        | > INTE |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Data                                           | > CORSNUM data set.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                       |        |     |
