+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                  | > ENDGRID                                        | > The ENDGRID keyword marks the end of the these set of keywords. Always set to 0 to indicate that there is no data section following this keyword.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | > Required            |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-2                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Format                                         | > ENDGRID                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > 0                   | > INTE | > 0 |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+
| > Notes:                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| 1)  Rows shaded in gray indicate the start of a keyword.                                                                                                                               |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| 2)  Cells colored orange in the No. column indicate that this item is not supported by OPM Flow and those colored red are either "Not Used" or "Undefined".                            |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
| 3)  For formatted output all character variables, including the keywords, should be enclosed in single quotes, for example the GRIDHEAD keyword should be written out as 'GRIDHEAD'.   |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                       |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------+--------+-----+

::: caption
Table : EGRID Global Irregular Corner Point Grid Keywords
:::

A.  1.  1.  ### EGRID LGR Irregular Corner Point Grid Keywords

The data structure for Local Grid Refinement ("LGR") Irregular Corner Point Grids is similar to the global grid format described in the previous section. Additional data that defines the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) properties ([LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Name for example) are included in this definition and the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) keywords are repeated for each [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the model. The keyword description is outlined in .

Note that currently OPM Flow does not support [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids and therefore this series of keywords cannot be used by OPM Flow.

+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)     | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) keyword defines the start of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) section of keywords and is required when LGRs are in the model.                                                                                                                               | > Required     |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > Format                                         | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > 1            | > CHAR |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > Data                                           | > Name of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > LGRPARNT                                       | > Start of LGRPARNT keyword that defines the parent [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) for when nested [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) have been used.                                                                                                                                              | > Optional     |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > Format                                         | > LGRPARNT                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | > 1            | > CHAR |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > Data                                           | > Name of parent [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > LGRSGRID                                       | > Start of the LGRSGRID keyword for LGRs parented from a sub-grid.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | > Optional     |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > Format                                         | > LGRSGRID                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | > 1            | > CHAR |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > Data                                           | > Name of parent [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > GRIDHEAD                                       | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grid keyword that defines the start of this keyword type for the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650).                                                                                                                                                              | > Required     |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  | > The format is the same as the Global grid keyword - see .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > BOXORIG                                        | > Not supported.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | > Optional     |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  | > The format is the same as the Global grid keyword - see .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256)    | > Property keyword that defines the start of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256) data set. The [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256) data defines a set of coordinate lines or pillars for [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grid via an array.  | > Required     |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  | > The format is the same as the Global grid keyword - see .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > [COORDSYS](#__RefHeading___Toc45759_719036256) | > Coordinate definitions for the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > Optional     |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  | > The format is the same as the Global grid keyword - see .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > [ZCORN](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_7190362561)   | > Property keyword that defines the start of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) [ZCORN](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_7190362561) data set. The format is the same as the Global grid keyword - see .                                                                                                           | > Required     |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > [ACTNUM](#__RefHeading___Toc4410_421927891)    | > Property keyword that defines the start of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) [ACTNUM](#__RefHeading___Toc4410_421927891) data set.                                                                                                                                                                      | > Optional     |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  | > The format is the same as the Global grid keyword - see .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > HOSTNUM                                        | > Property keyword that defines the start of the HOSTNUM data set. which is only applicable to [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids.                                                                                                                                                                       | > Required     |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  | > Number of data values for this keyword should be NX x NY x NZ integer values.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > Format                                         | > HOSTNUM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | > NX x NY x NZ | > INTE |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > Data                                           | > HOSTNUM data set.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > ENDGRID                                        | > The ENDGRID keyword marks the end of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Grid Header section. Always set to 0 to indicate that there is no Data section for this keyword.                                                                                                                                 | > Required     |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > Format                                         | > ENDGRID                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | > 0            | > INTE | > 0 |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > ENDLGR                                         | > ENDLGR keyword marks the end of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Header section. Always set to 0 to indicate that there is no Data section for this keyword.                                                                                                                                           | > Required     |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | > Format                                         | > ENDLGR                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | > 0            | > INTE | > 0 |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+
| > Notes:                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
| 1)  Rows shaded in gray indicate the start of a keyword.                                                                                                                                                                |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
| 2)  Cells colored orange in the No. column indicate that this item is not supported by OPM Flow.                                                                                                                        |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
| 3)  For formatted output all character variables, including the keywords, should be enclosed in single quotes, for example the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) keyword should be written out as 'LGR '.      |                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                |        |     |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------+--------+-----+

Table A.10: EGRID LGR Irregular Corner Point Grid Keywords

Note that this data set is repeated for each [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the model as demonstrated in the following example.

#### Example: EGRID LGR Irregular Corner Point Grid Keywords

The following example shows a typical formatted data set for this series of keywords with two Cartesian [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids, named LGR-1 and LGR-2 define via the following [CARFIN](#__RefHeading___Toc150726_63720426) keyword statements:

\--

\-- CARFIN LGR GRID COMMANDS

\--

\-- LGR \-\-\-\-- FINE GRID \-\-\-\-\-- \-- CARFIN GRID \-- MAX HOST

\-- NAME I1 I2 J1 J2 K1 K2 NX NY NZ WELLS NAME

CARFIN

\'LGR-1\' 2 2 2 2 1 1 2 2 2 1 GLOBAL / CARFIN LGR GRID PARAMETERS

\--

\-- CARFIN LGR GRID COMMANDS

\--

\-- LGR \-\-\-\-- FINE GRID \-\-\-\-\-- \-- CARFIN GRID \-- MAX HOST

\-- NAME I1 I2 J1 J2 K1 K2 NX NY NZ WELLS NAME

CARFIN

\'LGR-2\' 9 9 9 9 1 1 2 2 2 1 GLOBAL / CARFIN LGR GRID PARAMETERS

ENDFIN

The resulting keywords are as follows:
