|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |            |                |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                             | > The number of data values for this keyword data set should set to the number of non-neighbor connection to be read or written out (NUMNNC) for the TRANNC, DIFFNNC, HEATNCC, TRANCC, and [TRANGL](#__RefHeading___Toc1306682_4250154414) arrays.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |            |                |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |            |                |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                             | > The [NNC](#__RefHeading___Toc63285_718313858) keyword (items 1-1 and 2-1) are repeated for each non-neighbor connection array being written out.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |            |                |    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+----------------+----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | > Format                                    | > [NNC](#__RefHeading___Toc63285_718313858)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | > NUMNCC   | > REAL         |    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+----------------+----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | > Data                                      | > [NNC](#__RefHeading___Toc63285_718313858) data set.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |            |                |    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+----------------+----+
| > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Non-Neighbor Connection Keywords for Each [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)                                                                                                                   |                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |            |                |    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+----------------+----+
| > Notes:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |            |                |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |            |                |    |
| 1)  Rows shaded in gray indicate the start of a keyword and rows colored orange indicate the location of [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data if LGRs are present in the model.                                                          |                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |            |                |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |            |                |    |
| 2)  For formatted output all character variables, including the keyword should be enclosed in single quotes, for example the [PORV](#__RefHeading___Toc96547_718313858) and PROPERTY fields should be written out as 'PORV ' and 'DEPTH ', etc.     |                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |            |                |    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+----------------+----+

A.  1.  1.  ### INIT Data - LGR Static Data Header Keywords

The file structure for this series of keywords consists of two sets of keywords, the first set is repeated each time an [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data set is written out and the second set, which is the same as global static header keywords in section [INIT Data -- Static Data Header Keywords](#anchor-27), is only written once. The first set of keywords defines an [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)'s properties, [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Name for example, and always proceeds an [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data set for a given [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650); that is this series of keywords are repeated for each [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data set in the model. This is then followed by the second set of static data header keywords, or the actual array or table keywords. Termination of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data set occurs after the last [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data set has been written out using the LGRSGONE keyword, which switches input back to the global grid properties. outlines the structure of the [INIT](#__RefHeading___Toc45789_719036256) Data - [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Static Header Keywords and their affiliated data.

Note that currently OPM Flow does not support [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids and therefore this set of keywords cannot be used by OPM Flow.

+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) static data header keyword for the [INIT](#__RefHeading___Toc45789_719036256) Data file that defines the name of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650).                                        | > Always             |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Required           |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Keyword                                    | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)                                                                                                                                                                                                         | > 1                  | > CHAR |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Data                                       | > Name of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650).                                                                                                                                                                                            |                      |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | > LGRHEADI                                   | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) that defines the integer variables for this keyword.                                                                                                                                                    | > Always             |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Required           |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Format                                     | > LGRHEADI                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > 45                 | > INTE |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Data                                       | > Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
| > to                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
| > 2-45                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | > LGRHEADQ                                   | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grid keyword for the [INIT](#__RefHeading___Toc45789_719036256) Data file that defines the logical variables (T for true and F for false) for this keyword.                                             | > Always             |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Required           |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Format                                     | > LGRHEADQ                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > 5                  | > LOGI |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Data                                       | > Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
| > to                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
| > 2-5                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | > LGRHEADD                                   | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grid keyword for the [INIT](#__RefHeading___Toc45789_719036256) Data file that defines the double precision REAL variables for this keyword.                                                            | > Always             |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Required           |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Format                                     | > LGRHEADD                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > 5                  | > DOUB | > 5 |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Data                                       | > Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
| > to                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
| > 2-5                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | > LGRSGONE                                   | > The LGRSGONE keyword marks the end of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) section. Number of entries is always set to zero. There is no data set associated with this keyword.                                                          | > Always Required    |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > Format                                     | > LGRSGONE                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > 0                  | > MESG |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | > INTEHEAD                                   | > The keywords are the same as the [INIT](#__RefHeading___Toc45789_719036256) Data Static Data Header keywords but the data pertains to the current [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650). See for a detailed description of this keyword type. | > Required Only Once |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | > LOGIHEAD                                   | > See for a detailed description of this keyword type.                                                                                                                                                                                               | > Required Only Once |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | > DOUBHEAD                                   | > See for a detailed description of this keyword type.                                                                                                                                                                                               | > Required Only Once |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+
| > Notes:                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
| 1)  Rows shaded in gray indicate the start of a keyword.                                                                                                                                                                   |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
| 2)  Cells colored orange in the No. column indicate that this item is not supported by OPM Flow and those colored red are either "Not Used" or "Undefined".                                                                |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
| 3)  For formatted output all character variables, including the keyword name should be enclosed in single quotes, for example the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) keyword should be written out as 'LGR '.      |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                      |        |     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+--------+-----+

Table A.16: INIT Data - LGR Static Data Header Keywords

This series of keywords are repeated for each [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the model followed by the pertinent data and in the order outlined in and with the last [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data set terminated by the LGRSGONE keyword to mark the end of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) input section.

#### Example: INIT Data - LGR Static Header Keywords

The following example shows a typical formatted [INIT](#__RefHeading___Toc45789_719036256) Data - [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Grid Header Keyword data set for a single [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grid named LGR-1. As this is the first time [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data is being written out both sets of [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) header keywords are written out followed by the property array data.

-2345 -2345 -2345 -2345 -2345 -2345

-2345 -2345 -2345

F F F F F

................................................

A.  1.  1.  ### INIT Data - LGR Grid Array Data Keywords

The file structure for this set of keywords is identical to the Static Grid Array Data Keywords described in , except that [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) header keywords prefix the actual data keywords. Both the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) header and data keywords are repeated for each [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the model, and the last [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data set is terminated by the LGRSGONE keyword to mark the end of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) input section. The keyword description for this type of data set is outlined in .

Note that currently OPM Flow does not support [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids and therefore this series of keywords cannot be used by OPM Flow.

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Header Keywords (see ).                                                                                                                                                            | > Required           |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+
| > LGRHEADI                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+
| > LGRHEADQ                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+
| > LGRHEADD                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+
| > 1-2                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | > INTEHEAD                                   | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Header Keywords (see ).                                                                                                                                                            | > Required Only Once |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+
| > LOGIHEAD                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+
| > DOUBHEAD                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+
| > 1-3                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | > PROPERTY                                   | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) array data set for the current [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) -- same format as the [INIT](#__RefHeading___Toc45789_719036256) Data - Grid Array Data Keywords (see ). | > Required           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | > REGION                                     |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | > [NNC](#__RefHeading___Toc63285_718313858)  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | > or                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | > ENPOINIT                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+
| > 1-4                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | > LGRSGONE                                   | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Header Section termination keyword (see ).                                                                                                                                         | > Required           |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+
| > Notes:                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
| 1)  Rows shaded in gray indicate the start of a keyword.                                                                                                                                                              |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
| 2)  Cells colored orange in the No. column indicate that this item is not supported by OPM Flow.                                                                                                                      |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
| 3)  For formatted output all character variables, including the keyword should be enclosed in single quotes, for example the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) keyword should be written out as 'LGR '.      |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------+

Table A.17: INIT Data - LGR Grid Array Data Keywords

This keyword data set is repeated for each [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the model with the last [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data set terminated by the LGRSGONE keyword to mark the end of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data section.
