+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+--------+----+

|                                                                                                                                                                                      | > DOUBHEAD                                      | > Global grid keyword for the [RESTART](#__RefHeading___Toc135629_1317547213) Data file that defines the double precision REAL variables for this time step. NDHEAD is the number of entries associated with this keyword, and is dependent on the features being used in the model.                                                                                                                                                                            | > Required                                          |        |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                 | > Undefined values should be set to zero.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                                     |        |    |

| > 2-161                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-161                                                                                                                                                                              | > Data                                          | > The simulation [START](#__RefHeading___Toc39156_327352552) time, expressed in days for all units, except for the [LAB](#__RefHeading___Toc72458_2267116897) system of units which should expressed in hours.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                     |        |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-162                                                                                                                                                                              | > Data                                          | > Cumulative time from the start of the simulation, expressed in days for all units, except for the [LAB](#__RefHeading___Toc72458_2267116897) system of units which should expressed in hours. That is the sum of values (2-1) and (2-161).                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                     |        |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-163                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                 | > Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | > 0                                                 |        |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
| > to                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
| > 2-212                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-213                                                                                                                                                                              | > Data                                          | > [UDQPARAM](#__RefHeading___Toc161093_2932703077) item number 2 (Permitted range (+/-) of user-defined quantities).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | > UDQPAR_2                                          |        |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-214                                                                                                                                                                              | > Data                                          | > [UDQPARAM](#__RefHeading___Toc161093_2932703077) item number 3 (Value given to undefined elements when outputting data).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | > UDQPAR_3                                          |        |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-215                                                                                                                                                                              | > Data                                          | > [UDQPARAM](#__RefHeading___Toc161093_2932703077) item number 4 (fractional equality tolerance used in == \<= etc. functions).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | > UDQPAR_4                                          |        |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > Notes:                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
| 1)  Rows shaded in gray indicate the start of a keyword.                                                                                                                             |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
| 2)  Cells colored red in the No. column indicate that this item is either "Not Used" or "Undefined".                                                                                 |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |
| 3)  For formatted output all character variables, including the keyword should be enclosed in single quotes, for example the DOUBHEAD keyword should be written out as 'DOUBHEAD'.   |                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                     |        |    |

A.  1.  1.  ### RESTART Data -- Group, Well, and Connection Data Keywords

The Restart Data -- Well and Group Completion Keywords[^7] define various parameters associated with groups, wells, and connection keywords in the [RESTART](#__RefHeading___Toc135629_1317547213) file for both global and [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids.

The structure for this type of keyword is based on the data type as summarized below:

3)  1)  1)  The group data set keywords are specified in and consists of the IGRP, SGRP, XGRP, and ZGRP keywords.

        2)   contains the multi-segment well keywords that consist of the ISEG, RSEG, ILBS, ILBR, and ICRD keywords.

        3)  For wells the keywords are IWEL, SWEL, XWEL, and ZWEL and describes these keywords.

        4)  Well connection keywords are specified in and consist of the ICON, SCON, and XCON keywords.

        5)  Tracer keywords are listed in and consists of the ICOT, XCOT, IWET, XWET, IGRT, and XGRT keywords.

        6)  Finally, the network keywords INODE, IBRAN, INOBR, RNODE, RBRAN, and ZNODE are specified in .

Note that if multi-segment wells, tracers, and networks are absent from the simulation deck then this data will not be written to the [RESTART](#__RefHeading___Toc135629_1317547213) Data file.

The following table outlines the keywords for groups.

+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
|                     | > IGRP   | > Keyword defines the integer Group, well, and connection data for this time step.                                                                                                                                              | > Required        |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | > Undefined values should be set to zero.                                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 1-1               | > Format | > IGRP                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | > NSGRPZ x NGMAXZ | > INTE |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-1               | > Data   | > Integer group data array IGRP(NIGRPZ, NGMAXZ) where NIGRPZ and NGMAXZ are defined on the INTEHEAD keyword.                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
| > to                |          | > Entries 1 to NWGMAX define the index of each well in the group, if this is a well group, or the index of each child group in this group if it is a node group.                                                                |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
| > 2-NWGMAX          |          | > Note that undefined items in this array may be set to zero.                                                                                                                                                                   |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 1)  |          | 3)  The number of wells or child groups belonging to this group.                                                                                                                                                                |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 2)  |          | 3)  A parameter indicating production group control mode, set to:                                                                                                                                                               |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```{=html}                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | <!-- -->                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 0.   NONE or [FIELD](#__RefHeading___Toc71850_2267116897).                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 1.   Oil rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 2.   Water rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 3.   Gas rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 4.   Liquid rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 5.  Reservoir volume rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 6)  |          | 3)  A parameter that defines if the group is controlled by its own targets/limits, or is open to respond to higher level control, or is controlled by a higher level group (see details in code).                               |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```{=html}                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | <!-- -->                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 0.  If group is injection group.                                                                                                                                                                                                |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 7)  |          | 3)  A parameter that is dependent on the higher level group control active and guide rate defined for the group.                                                                                                                |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```{=html}                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | <!-- -->                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 0.  No group guide rate, or the group is the [FIELD](#__RefHeading___Toc71850_2267116897) group.                                                                                                                                |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 1.  Unknown.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 2.  Unknown.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 3.  Unknown.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 4.  Unknown.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 5.  Unknown.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 6.  Unknown.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 7.  Unknown.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 8.  Group guide rate defined and higher level guide rate control.                                                                                                                                                               |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 8)  |          | 3)  A parameter that defines which rate reduction option is used for a production group. If rate reduction is used, the value is generally four (4).                                                                            |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```{=html}                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | <!-- -->                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 0.   [FIELD](#__RefHeading___Toc71850_2267116897) group.                                                                                                                                                                        |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 11) |          | 3)  A parameter describing the production control item defined via item two, the TARGET variable, on the [GCONPROD](#__RefHeading___Toc146746_4203985108) keyword:                                                              |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```{=html}                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | <!-- -->                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 0.  NONE or [FIELD](#__RefHeading___Toc71850_2267116897).                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 1.  Oil rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 2.  Water rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 3.  Gas rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 4.  Liquid rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 5.  Reservoir volume rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 17) |          | 3)  A parameter describing the water injection control defined via item three, the TARGET variable, on the [GCONINJE](#__RefHeading___Toc134874_2055188184) keyword:                                                            |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```{=html}                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | <!-- -->                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 0.  NONE or [FIELD](#__RefHeading___Toc71850_2267116897).                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 1.  Rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 2.  Reservoir volume rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 3.  Re-injection fraction.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 4.   Voidage replacement.                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 18) |          | 3)  A parameter for a water injection group that defines if the group is controlled by its own targets/limits, or is open to respond to higher level control, or is controlled by a higher level group (see details in code).   |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 22) |          | 3)  A parameter dependent on the gas injection control defined via item three, the TARGET variable, on the [GCONINJE](#__RefHeading___Toc134874_2055188184) keyword:                                                            |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```{=html}                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | <!-- -->                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 0.  NONE or [FIELD](#__RefHeading___Toc71850_2267116897).                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 1.  Rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 2.  Reservoir volume rate.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 3.  Re-injection fraction.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 4.  Voidage replacement.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 23) |          | 3)  A parameter for a gas injection group that defines if the group is controlled by its own targets/limits, or is open to respond to higher level control, or is controlled by a higher level group (see details in code).     |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 27) |          | 3)  A variable that defines the group type with:                                                                                                                                                                                |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```{=html}                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | <!-- -->                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | ```                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 0.  for a well group.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 1.  for a node group.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 2.  for a satellite group.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          | 3.  for a slave group.                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 28) |          | 3)  The level of the group, with 0 representing the Field group.                                                                                                                                                                |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 29) |          | 3)  The index of the parent group.                                                                                                                                                                                              |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 34) |          | 3)  The sum of the number of active production and injection wells for the group.                                                                                                                                               |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2 - (NWGMAX + 89) |          | 3)  Group sequence number according to the sequence in the input deck, equals NGMAXZ for the [FIELD](#__RefHeading___Toc71850_2267116897) group.                                                                                |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
|                     | > SGRP   | > Keyword defines the real group data array SGRP(NIGRPZ, NGMAXZ) where NIGRPZ and NGMAXZ are defined on the INTEHEAD keyword.                                                                                                   | > Required        |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 1-1               | > Format | > SGRP                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | > NSGRPZ x NGMAXZ | > REAL |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-1               |          | > Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
| > to                |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
|                     |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
| > 2-6               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-7               | > Data   | > Group\'s oil production target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                                         |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-8               | > Data   | > Group\'s water production target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-9               | > Data   | > Group\'s gas production target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                                         |                   |        |    |

+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+

+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+

+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-13              | > Data   | > Group\'s oil re-injection fraction target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                              |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-14              | > Data   | > Group\'s oil voidage injection fraction target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                         |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-15              |          | > Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-16              | > Data   | > Group\'s water surface volume injection rate target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-17              | > Data   | > Group\'s water reservoir volume injection rate target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                  |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-18              | > Data   | > Group\'s water re-injection fraction target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                            |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-19              | > Data   | > Group\'s water voidage injection fraction target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-20              |          | > Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-21              | > Data   | > Group\'s gas surface volume injection rate target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-22              | > Data   | > Group\'s gas reservoir volume injection rate target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                    |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-23              | > Data   | > Group\'s gas re-injection fraction target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                              |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-24              | > Data   | > Group\'s gas voidage injection fraction target/limit.                                                                                                                                                                         |                   |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
|                     | > XGRP   | > Keyword defines the double precision group data array XGRP(NIGRPZ, NGMAXZ) where NIGRPZ and NGMAXZ are defined on the INTEHEAD keyword.                                                                                       | > Required        |        |    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+--------+----+
