+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-2                                                              | > Data   | > Sequence number of [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077) used (from input sequence) for the actual constraint/target.                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                          |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-3                                                              | > Data   | > Set to one (1).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                                          |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-4                                                              | > Data   | > Number of times the [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077) variable is used.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                          |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-5                                                              | > Data   | > The sequence number for the first use of the actual [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077), equal to one (1) plus the (sum over the earlier [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077)'s of the number of uses of the respective [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077)'s).         |                                                          |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
|                                                                    | > IUAP   | > The keyword defines the sequence number of the actual well, group, etc. for each [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077) use in [WCONPROD](#__RefHeading___Toc146754_4203985108), [GCONPROD](#__RefHeading___Toc146746_4203985108), [GCONINJE](#__RefHeading___Toc134874_2055188184), etc. | > Required                                               |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 1-1                                                              | > Format | > IUAP                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > No. IUAP's                                             | > INTE   |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-1                                                              | > Data   | > Equals the well, group, etc. sequence number for the UDQ-Variable used in actual target, limit.                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                                          |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
|                                                                    | > IGPH   | > This keyword defines an integer number per group, and for the [FIELD](#__RefHeading___Toc71850_2267116897) which is the last group in the list.                                                                                                                                                | > Required                                               |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 1-1                                                              | > Format | > IGPH                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > Max Number Groups in the Field plus one.               | > INTE   |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-1                                                              | > Data   | > The value of the integer denotes the phase (or component) for injection group control ([GCONINJE](#__RefHeading___Toc134874_2055188184)):                                                                                                                                                      |                                                          |          |    |
|                                                                    |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                          |          |    |
|                                                                    |          | 0.  No injection control.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                          |          |    |
|                                                                    |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                          |          |    |
|                                                                    |          | 1.  Oil phase injection control.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                          |          |    |
|                                                                    |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                          |          |    |
|                                                                    |          | 2.  Water phase injection.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                                          |          |    |
|                                                                    |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                          |          |    |
|                                                                    |          | 3.  Gas injection.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                          |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
|                                                                    | > ZUDN   | > Keyword pairs of data for each [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077).                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | > Required                                               |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 1-1                                                              | > Format | > ZUDN                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > No. [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077)'s x 2  | > CHAR   |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-1                                                              | > Data   | > [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077) name (maximum of eight characters per [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077)).                                                                                                                                                                |                                                          |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+

+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
|                                                                    | > ZUDL   | > This keyword contains the EXPRESSION variable (item three) on the [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077) keyword in the input deck "Data for operation".                                                                                                                                  | > Required                                               |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 1-1                                                              | > Format | > ZUDL                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > No. [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077)'s x 16 | > CHAR   |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+

+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+

+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 1-1                                                              | > Format | > DUDW                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > No. Well UDQs x                                        | > DOUBLE |    |

|                                                                    |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Max No. of Wells.                                      |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-1 to no of well [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077)'s  | > Data   | > The value of the [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077) for the actual well (repeated for all wells in the well input sequence).                                                                                                                                                          |                                                          |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
|                                                                    | > DUDG   | > Keyword containing the values of all the group [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077)'s.                                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Required                                               |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+

+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-1 to no of group [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077)'s | > Data   | > The value of [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077) for the actual group (repeated for all groups in the group input sequence).                                                                                                                                                           |                                                          |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
|                                                                    | > DUDF   | > Keyword containing the values of all the field [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077)'s.                                                                                                                                                                                                  | > Required                                               |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 1-1                                                              | > Format | > DUDF                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | > No. Field UDQs                                         | > DOUBLE |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-1 to no of field [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077)'s | > Data   | > Value of [UDQ](#__RefHeading___Toc161095_2932703077) for field UDQs.                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                          |          |    |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+

|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |

For field variables.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                            |          |    |

| > 2-13        | > Data   | > Index for relational operator (\<, =, \> ):                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |

For LHS quantity greater RHS quantity.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                            |          |    |

|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 0.  AND                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 1.  OR                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-17        | > Data   | > Defines the operator used in [ACTIONX](#__RefHeading___Toc152227_2992482751) for defined quantities:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 0.  For the \> operator.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 1.  For the \< operator.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 2.  For the \>= operator.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 3.  For the \<= operator.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 4.  For the = operator.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-18        | > Data   | > The value relates to the operator for the triggering condtion and if the right hand quantity is a constant or not. There is one value for each condition and the value is determined as follows:                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 3)  For the first condition in an [ACTIONX](#__RefHeading___Toc152227_2992482751) statement iacn\[17\] = 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 4)  For the second, third etc. conditions iacn\[17\] is determined using the following logic:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | > If the previous condition has a constant rhs =\> iacn\[17\] = 0.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | > If previous rhs is of type {W,G, F} and                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | > If previous boolean operator is AND =\> iacn\[17\] = 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | > If previous boolean operator is OR =\> iacn\[17\] = 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | > Note as mentioned previously, the No. column in this table and all tables in [APPENDIX A:](#anchor), the count is based on one (offset one); however, in C++ the base is zero (offset zero) and therefore C++ programmers must subtract one from this column to obtain the correct reference. Hence, the iacn\[17\] reference is the correct reference for C++.  |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
|               | > SACT   | > Keyword defines various parameters for an [ACTIONX](#__RefHeading___Toc152227_2992482751) keyword                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | > Required                                                                 |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 1-1         | > Format | > SACT                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | > No. Actions x 5                                                          | > REAL   |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-1 to 2-5  | > Data   | 0.  Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+

+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+

+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+

| > 2-1         | > Data   | > Left hand side quantity if (DAY, MONTH or YEAR).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-2         | > Data   | > Right hand side quantity if (Well or Group).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-3         | > Data   | > Operator.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-4         | > Data   | > Well name -- left hand quantity, if it is a well quantity.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-5         | > Data   | > Well name -- right hand quantity, if it is a well quantity.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-6         | > Data   | > Group name -- left hand quantity, if it is a group quantity.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-7         | > Data   | > Group name -- right hand quantity, if it is a group quantity.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
|               | > SACN   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | > Required                                                                 |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 1-1         | > Format | > SACN                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | > No. of Actions x Max No. Conditions x 16                                 | > DOUBLE |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-1         | > Data   | 0.  Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-2         | > Data   | 0.  Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-3         | > Data   | > Value of condition:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 0.  If Month otherwise zero.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-4         | > Data   | 0.  Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-5         | > Data   | 0.  Well or Field data, or                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
|               |          | 1.  Group data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-6         | > Data   | > Value of right hand side.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-7         | > Data   | > Value of left hand side.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-8         | > Data   | > Value of right hand side.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-9         | > Data   | > Value of left hand slide.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+
| > 2-10        | > Data   | > Value of right hand side.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                            |          |    |
+---------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+----+

A.  1.  1.  ### RESTART Data -- Aquifer Data Keywords

This set of keywords are used to define the various aquifer arrays written out by OPM Flow. If there are no aquifers in the model then this set of keywords are skipped. If an analytical or numerical model aquifer is present in the model, a complete set of keywords, for a given aquifer type, should be written out. For example, if a numerical model is defined in the model then the IAQN and RAQN keywords should be written to the file.

The structure for this set of keywords is dependent on the aquifer type, for analytical aquifers the format is outlined in and numerical aquifers are characterized in .

+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                  | > IAAQ                                       | > Analytical aquifers integer data array IAAQ(NIAAQZ, MAAQID) where NIAAQZ and MAAQIDR are defined in the INTEHEAD keyword.                                                                 | > Optional                                      |        |    |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                            | > Format                                     | > IAAQ                                                                                                                                                                                      | > NIAAQZ x MAAQID                               | > INTE |    |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-1                                                                                                                                                                            | > Data                                       | > Aquifer connection number.                                                                                                                                                                |                                                 |        |    |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-2                                                                                                                                                                            | > Data                                       | > Water property table.                                                                                                                                                                     | > [PVTNUM](#__RefHeading___Toc68366_2752266063) |        |    |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-3                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              | > Undefined.                                                                                                                                                                                |                                                 |        |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                 |        |    |
| > to                                                                                                                                                                             |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                 |        |    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                 |        |    |
| > 2-9                                                                                                                                                                            |                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                 |        |    |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-10                                                                                                                                                                           | > Data                                       | > Analytical aquifer type, set to zero for Fetkovich aquifers and one for CarterTracy aquifers.                                                                                             |                                                 |        |    |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 2-11                                                                                                                                                                           | > Data                                       | > Type Related 2.                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                 |        |    |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
|                                                                                                                                                                                  | > SAAQ                                       | > Analytical aquifers real data array SAAQ(NSAAQZ, MAAQID) where NSAAQZ and MAAQIDR are defined in the INTEHEAD keyword.                                                                    | > Optional                                      |        |    |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
| > 1-1                                                                                                                                                                            | > Format                                     | > SAAQ                                                                                                                                                                                      | > NSAAQZ x MAAQID                               | > REAL |    |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+--------+----+
