A.  1.  1.  ### RESTART Data - LGR Solution Data Keywords

The file structure for this series of keywords is similar to the global grid [RESTART](#__RefHeading___Toc135629_1317547213) Data keywords described previously. However, additional data that the defines the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) properties ([LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Name for example) are included in this keyword definition and the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) keyword is repeated for each [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the model. The keyword description is outlined in .

Note that currently OPM Flow does not support [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids and therefore this keyword format cannot be used by OPM Flow.

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)                                    | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) Grid Header keyword.                                                                                                                                                             | > Required |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 | > See section [A.5.1](#anchor-22) [RESTART Data - LGR Grid Header Keywords](#anchor-22).                                                                                                                                      |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
| > LGRHEADI                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
| > LGRHEADQ                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
| > LGRHEADD                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
| > INTEHEAD                                                                                                                                                                                                             | > Header keyword.                                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > See section [A.8.3](#anchor-49) [RESTART Data - Header Keywords](#anchor-49). |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
| > LOGIHEAD                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
| > DOUBHEAD                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > IGRP                                                                          | > Group, well, and connection data status keywords for this reporting time step.                                                                                                                                              | > Required |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > SGRP                                                                          | > See section [A.8.4](#anchor-50) [RESTART Data -- Group, Well, and Connection Data Keywords](#anchor-50).                                                                                                                    |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > etc.                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > IAAQ                                                                          | > Aquifer definition arrays, only applicable if an aquifer is connected to an [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650).                                                                                                     | > Optional |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > SAAQ                                                                          | > See section [A.8.6](#anchor-51) [RESTART Data -- Aquifer Data Keywords](#anchor-51).                                                                                                                                        |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > ect.                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > HIDDEN                                                                        | > HIDDEN solution data, that is a list of solution arrays NOT to be read by post processing software.                                                                                                                         | > Required |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 | > See section [A.8.7](#anchor-52) [RESTART Data -- Hidden Keyword](#anchor-52).                                                                                                                                               |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > [SOLUTION](#__RefHeading___Toc43947_784232322)                                | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) [SOLUTION](#__RefHeading___Toc43947_784232322) array section ([PRESSURE](#__RefHeading___Toc135627_1317547213), [SGAS](#__RefHeading___Toc137369_1317547213), SOILS, WAT, etc.). | > Required |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 | > See section [A.8.8](#anchor-53) [RESTART Data - Solution Data keyword](#anchor-53).                                                                                                                                         |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > ENDSOL                                                                        | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) [SOLUTION](#__RefHeading___Toc43947_784232322) section termination keyword.                                                                                                      | > Required |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 | > See section [A.8.8](#anchor-53) [RESTART Data - Solution Data keyword](#anchor-53).                                                                                                                                         |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | > ENDLGR                                                                        | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grid header section termination keywords.                                                                                                                                        | > Required |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 | > See section [A.5.1](#anchor-22) [RESTART Data - LGR Grid Header Keywords](#anchor-22).                                                                                                                                      |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+
| > Notes:                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
| 1)  Rows shaded in gray indicate the start of a keyword.                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
| 2)  Cells colored orange in the No. column indicate that this item is not supported by OPM Flow.                                                                                                                       |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
| 3)  For formatted output all character variables, including the keyword, should be enclosed in single quotes, for example the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) keyword should be written out as 'LGR '.      |                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+

Table A.36: RESTART Data -- LGR Solution Data Keywords

This set of keywords are repeated for each [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) in the model with the last [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data set terminated by the ENDSOL and ENDLGR keywords to mark the end of the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) input - see the example.
