A.  1.  1.  ### SUMMARY Data File Keywords

The structure for this series of keywords is relatively simple compared to the [SUMMARY](#__RefHeading___Toc43949_784232322) Index file, in that it only consists of four keyword types that are written out at the requested time steps, as outlined in .

+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
|                                                             | > SEQNUM  | > This keyword contains a sequence data value corresponding to an encoded integer representing the time the file was created. Although required the data is not used.  | > Required |        |    |
|                                                             |           |                                                                                                                                                                        |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > Secondly, this keyword is written at each report step only and not for each inter leaving mini step, that is the file format is of the following format:             |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           |                                                                                                                                                                        |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > SEQNUM Report step n\                                                                                                                                                |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > MINISTEP\                                                                                                                                                            |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > PARAMS\                                                                                                                                                              |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > MINISTEP\                                                                                                                                                            |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > PARAMS\                                                                                                                                                              |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > MINISTEP\                                                                                                                                                            |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > PARAMS\                                                                                                                                                              |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > INISTEP\                                                                                                                                                             |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > PARAMS\                                                                                                                                                              |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > SEQNUM Report step n + 1\                                                                                                                                            |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > MINISTEP\                                                                                                                                                            |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > PARAMS\                                                                                                                                                              |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > MINISTEP\                                                                                                                                                            |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           | > PARAMS                                                                                                                                                               |            |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
| > 1-1                                                       | > Format  | > SEQNUM                                                                                                                                                               | > 1        | > INTE |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
| > 2-1                                                       | > Data    | > The value entered is not used by either OPM Flow or OPM ResInsight                                                                                                   | > 0        |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
|                                                             | > MINSTEP | > The time step number starting from zero and incremented by one for each subsequent time step.                                                                        | > Required |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
| > 1-1                                                       | > Format  | > MINISTEP                                                                                                                                                             | > 1        | > INTE |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
| > 2-1                                                       | > Data    | > Time step.                                                                                                                                                           |            |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
|                                                             | > PARAMS  | > This keyword contains the actual data for all the vectors and objects specified in the index file.                                                                   | > Required |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
| > 1-1                                                       | > Format  | > PARAMS                                                                                                                                                               | > NLIST    | > REAL |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
| > 2-1                                                       | > Data    | > There should be NLIST values corresponding to the variable list declared on the corresponding [SUMMARY](#__RefHeading___Toc43949_784232322) Index file.              |            |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
| > Notes:                                                    |           |                                                                                                                                                                        |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           |                                                                                                                                                                        |            |        |    |
| 1)  Rows shaded in gray indicate the start of a keyword.    |           |                                                                                                                                                                        |            |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+

Table A.45: SUMMARY Data File Keywords

For LGRs, the global cell data is written to the standard [SUMMARY](#__RefHeading___Toc43949_784232322) Data file containing an additional keyword that states the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) name, as depicted in .

+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
|                                                             | > SEQHDR  | > As per                                                                     | > Required |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
|                                                             | > LGRNAME | > Name of Local Grid Refinement.                                             | > Required |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
|                                                             | > Format  | > LGRNAME                                                                    | > 1        | > CHAR |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
|                                                             | > Data    | > [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) name enclosed in single quotes. |            |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
|                                                             | > MINSTEP | > As per .                                                                   | > Required |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
|                                                             | > PARAMS  | > As per .                                                                   | > Required |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+
| > Notes:                                                    |           |                                                                              |            |        |    |
|                                                             |           |                                                                              |            |        |    |
| 1)  Rows shaded in gray indicate the start of a keyword.    |           |                                                                              |            |        |    |
+-------------------------------------------------------------+-----------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+--------+----+

Table A.46: SUMMARY Data File Keywords (LGR)

The data for the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) time steps, as opposed to the global time step, are written out to a separate [SUMMARY](#__RefHeading___Toc43949_784232322) Data File, with the suffix of [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) or FLG for fixed format output. In this case, the MINSTEP keyword states the "local" time step and the keyword is repeated for each local grid in the model.

#### Example: SUMMARY Data Data File keyword

The following example shows a typical formatted [SUMMARY](#__RefHeading___Toc43949_784232322) Data File keyword data set for one complete report time step and part of a second report time step.

\'SEQHDR \' 1 \'INTE\'

1

\'MINISTEP\' 1 \'INTE\'

0

\'PARAMS \' 164 \'REAL\'

0.50000000E+00 0.13689254E-02 0.18381236E+11 0.51459348E+10

0.13235301E+11 0.00000000E+00 0.00000000E+00 0.37649313E+03

0.95391960E+07 0.47695980E+07 0.10947282E+09 0.30000488E+06

0.10917282E+09 0.00000000E+00 0.00000000E+00 0.25336973E+05

0.12668486E+05 0.27468176E+03 0.15571577E+05 0.77857886E+04

0.63867320E+05 0.31933660E+05 0.12643164E-02 0.60474832E+08

0.15000000E+05 0.75000000E+04 0.32074501E+02 0.16037251E+02

0.00000000E+00 0.00000000E+00 0.37649313E+03 0.95391960E+07

0.47695980E+07 0.00000000E+00 0.00000000E+00 0.25336973E+05

0.12668486E+05 0.15571577E+05 0.77857886E+04 0.63867320E+05

0.31933660E+05 0.12643164E-02 0.15000000E+05 0.75000000E+04

0.32074501E+02 0.16037251E+02 0.26000000E+03 0.26172531E+03

0.26362421E+03 0.26596732E+03 0.26747589E+03 0.26896045E+03

.............................................

\'SEQHDR \' 1 \'INTE\'

2

\'MINISTEP\' 1 \'INTE\'

1

\'PARAMS \' 164 \'REAL\'

0.10000000E+01 0.27378509E-02 0.18377710E+11 0.51453399E+10

0.13232370E+11 0.00000000E+00 0.00000000E+00 0.32637939E+03

................................................

End of Example

A.  1.  ## SAVE Files - Initialization and Solution Data

This file format is currently not supported by OPM Flow.

[^1]: Several keywords are used for both global and [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids, for example the GRIDHEAD, [COORD](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_719036256), [*ZCORN*](#__RefHeading___Toc45757_7190362561) keywords.

[^2]: Several *keywords *are used for both global and [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids, for example the INTEHEAD, LOGIHEAD, DOUBHEAD, PROPERTY, and REGION keywords and arrays.

[^3]: For example in a three phase (oil, gas, and water) runs only two phase saturations are needed for a "restart" run, as the third phase can be calculated in by summing two phases and subtracting from one.

[^4]: Several keywords are used for both global and [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids, for example the INTEHEAD, LOGIHEAD, and DOUBHEAD keywords and [SOLUTION](#__RefHeading___Toc43947_784232322) arrays.

[^5]: The group, well, and connection production data is not stored on the [RESTART](#__RefHeading___Toc135629_1317547213) file, but is instead stored on the [SUMMARY](#__RefHeading___Toc43949_784232322) file. The [RESTART](#__RefHeading___Toc135629_1317547213) file contains the group, well, and connection configurations as the they change versus time. For example, the status of a well (OPEN or SHUT), or the connections open to flow in a well.

[^6]: The [RESTART](#__RefHeading___Toc135629_1317547213) Data -- Header *keywords are* used both for global and [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids with the global grid data for the global grid and the individual [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data for the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids. The [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data is preceded by a series of [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) header keywords and terminated by an [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) termination keyword.

[^7]: The [RESTART](#__RefHeading___Toc135629_1317547213) Data -- Group, Well and Connection *keywords are* used both for global and [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids with groups, well, and connection data for the global grid, and wells and connection data for wells contained in the individual [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650)s for the [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids. The [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data is preceded by a series of [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) header keywords and terminated by an [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) termination keyword.

[^8]: The [RESTART](#__RefHeading___Toc135629_1317547213) Data -- Hidden keyword format is used both for global and [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids.

[^9]: The [RESTART](#__RefHeading___Toc135629_1317547213) Data - Solution Data keywords *are* used both for global and [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) grids [SOLUTION](#__RefHeading___Toc43947_784232322) arrays. The [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) data is preceded by a series of [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) head keywords and terminated by an [LGR](#__RefHeading___Toc55049_4106839650) termination keyword.
